# llms.txt

Repository: `israel-rent-data-collector`
Purpose: collect official Israeli rent benchmarks, validate them, and publish CSV outputs.

## Core Tree
```text
src/
  rent_collector/
    cli.py
    config.py
    models.py
    pipeline.py
    collectors/
      base.py
      nadlan.py
      cbs_table49.py
      cbs_api.py
      boi_hedonic.py
      data_gov_il.py
    utils/
      http_client.py
      locality_crosswalk.py
scripts/
  collect.py
data/
  locality_codes_seed.csv
  output/
docs/
  00_project_overview.md
  01_system_architecture.md
  02_output_datasets_schema.md
  03_implementation_plan.md
  CODEX_HANDOFF.md
  CODEX_HANDOFF_UPDATE.md
  sources.md
```

## Entry Points
- CLI wrapper: `scripts/collect.py`
- Python CLI entry: `src/rent_collector/cli.py`
- Pipeline entry: `src/rent_collector/pipeline.py`

## Critical Schemas
- Output record model: `src/rent_collector/models.py` (`RentObservation`)
- Locality schema: `src/rent_collector/models.py` (`Locality`)
- Hedonic coefficients schema: `src/rent_collector/models.py` (`BoIHedonicCoefficients`)
- Output column reference: `docs/02_output_datasets_schema.md`

## Internal APIs
- Collector contract: `src/rent_collector/collectors/base.py`
- nadlan fetch/parse: `src/rent_collector/collectors/nadlan.py`
- CBS Table 4.9 download/parse: `src/rent_collector/collectors/cbs_table49.py`
- CBS API catalog/series handling: `src/rent_collector/collectors/cbs_api.py`
- BoI fallback model: `src/rent_collector/collectors/boi_hedonic.py`
- Crosswalk builder: `src/rent_collector/utils/locality_crosswalk.py`
- Shared HTTP client: `src/rent_collector/utils/http_client.py`

## Configuration
- Runtime paths, endpoints, and source toggles: `src/rent_collector/config.py`
- Packaging and dev tooling: `pyproject.toml`

## Data Outputs
- Main benchmark CSV: `data/output/rent_benchmarks.csv`
- Locality crosswalk CSV: `data/output/locality_crosswalk.csv`
- Publication destination after validated runs: `../israel-rent-data/`

## Deep Context
- Project purpose: `docs/00_project_overview.md`
- Architecture details: `docs/01_system_architecture.md`
- Implementation checklist: `docs/03_implementation_plan.md`
- Source inventory: `docs/sources.md`
